title: oryzopsis × bloomeri
intro: Oryzopsis × bloomeri, also known as a hybrid of the rice grass, is a type of grass species that is native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The oryzopsis × bloomeri has been reported to have several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. It has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
